title: stomatanthes corumbensis
intro: Stomatanthes corumbensis, also known as the Brazilian soursop, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Brazil and other parts of the continent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stomatanthes corumbensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for consumption.
